target_skill.name: build
target_skill.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: architect
competing_skills.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: systematic-debug
competing_skills.description: Fix bugs systematically — "X is broken", "isn't working", "fix didn't work", "still failing", "why is X happening". Not for features (→ build) or architecture (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: systematic-test
competing_skills.description: Verify built code works — "test this", "QA this", "does this work". Auto-fires after build. Not for bugs (→ systematic-debug) or code review (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: ship-it
competing_skills.description: Set up deployment — "ship it", "deploy this", "host this", "App Store", "Claude Code handoff". Not for fixes to live sites (→ git-ops), prototyping (→ build), or planning (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Evaluate a raw idea with scoring — "scout this", "what if we built", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas in fresh chats. Not for building (→ architect) or saving without eval (→ idea-vault).

positive_cases: Build me a React artifact for tracking daily water intake with plus/minus buttons
Prototype a 2-player tic-tac-toe game in pure HTML, no dependencies
Make this real — a small script that archives Grove tasks stale for 30+ days
MVP this idea: a tool that diffs two listing-photo sets and flags the changes
negative_cases: Write a SPEC.md for the auth rewrite — I want to interview through the requirements
The /api/cache route returns 500 on every other call — find and fix it
Set up an iOS App Store listing for the grove-mobile app
What if we built a meal tracker that pulls from grocery receipts?
QA the new vault filter UI I just shipped — does it actually work?
